page.title: Environment variables
page.tagline: API keys and other config injected into each agent's runtime at launch.
page.empty_hint: Variables set on an agent (e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL) appear here. Configure them from the agent's settings.
page.no_matches: No agents or variables match your search.
page.load_error: Couldn't load environment variables. Try refreshing.
page.forbidden_hint: Only workspace owners and admins can view environment variables.
page.masked_hint: Values are hidden. This page is read-only — configure variables from each agent's settings.
